features: YOUR HOT STYLE SAVIOUR: Some Like It Hot heat protectant spray defends against heat damage from styling tools up to 230 degree Celsius helping to maintain stronger, healthier hair no matter how often you style; Simply spray, style, and go for salon-worthy results

FRIZZ? HUMIDITY? NOT TODAY: Formulated with Anti-Humidity Shields to fight the frizz, especially for coloured hair that has lost its defence during colouring and processing, leaving hair soft, smooth and tangle-free

THE DAMAGE DEFENDER YOU NEED: Powered by Repair Active Technology, this formula strengthens weak protein bonds, reduces breakage and smooths split ends, keeping hair resilient and smooth even under extreme heat

SOFT, SMOOTH AND NOURISHED: Infused with Sunflower Seed Oil, Vitamin E and Grapefruit Extract, this lightweight spray hydrates, nourishes, and boosts shine – with a non-sticky or greasy feeling; Be prepared for your hair’s new signature scent

BLOW-DRY, STRAIGHTEN OR CURL – ANY STYLE, PROTECTED: This multitasker offers the ultimate heat protection for hair of all types, styles and lengths; Spray on wet hair and comb through for even distribution and ultimate heat protection
description: Product Description Turn Up the Heat - Without the Damage Heat styling should be fun, not a one-way ticket to dry, brittle strands. Some Like It Hot heat protection spray is your go-to defence against the damage caused by blow dryers, straighteners, and curling wands. Designed with salon professionals, this powerful formula shields hair from styling temperatures up to 230 degree Celsius, helping to prevent breakage, dryness, and split ends. Because great hair starts with protection, this spray creates a lightweight barrier that defends against high heat while keeping your style looking sleek, frizz-free, and smooth. The Ultimate Frizz Fighter Heat isn’t the only thing threatening your style - humidity, frizz, and flyaways can be just as frustrating. That’s why Some Like It Hot is formulated with Anti-Humidity Shields, which help restore frizz-fighting barriers that hair naturally loses through colouring and processing. These shields don’t just tame flyaways, they work to keep hair soft, smooth, and tangle-free. Whether your hair is natural, coloured, or chemically treated, this formula works overtime to keep it under control. Stronger, Smoother, Healthier Hair Heat styling can weaken the protein bonds in your hair, leading to breakage, rough texture, and split ends. Some Like It Hot fights back with Repair Active Technology, which penetrates the hair fibre, strengthening weak, damaged strands from within. The result? Healthier, more resilient looking hair that can withstand frequent heat styling. Hydration and Shine Without the Weight A great heat protection spray shouldn’t just protect, it should nourish. That’s why Some Like It Hot is infused with Sunflower Seed Oil, Vitamin E, and Grapefruit Extract, ingredients known for their moisturising, strengthening, and shine-boosting properties. How to Use For best results, spray Some Like It Hot only onto wet hair, prior to heat styling. Apply evenly and comb through before blow-drying to protect and smooth strands, then style with your favourite tools. Ingredients WATER (AQUA/EAU), GLYCERIN, VP/VA COPOLYMER, PEG-7 DIMETHICONE, PHENOXYETHANOL, PEG/PPG-25/25 DIMETHICONE, LAURETH-7, FRAGRANCE (PARFUM), CAPRYLYL GLYCOL, COCETH-7, PPG-1-PEG-9 LAURYL GLYCOL ETHER, POLYSORBATE 20, PEG-40 HYDROGENATED CASTOR OIL, CITRIC ACID, GLUCONOLACTONE, TREHALOSE, HELIANTHUS ANNUUS (SUNFLOWER) SEED OIL, PROPYLENE GLYCOL, CITRUS PARADISI (GRAPEFRUIT) FRUIT EXTRACT, CETRIMONIUM CHLORIDE, DISODIUM EDTA, LACTIC ACID, SODIUM BENZOATE, SODIUM SULFATE, ISOPROPYL ALCOHOL, LAURTRIMONIUM CHLORIDE, BENZOPHENONE-4, CITRONELLOL, COUMARIN, LIMONENE, LINALOOL. Bed Head by TIGI are committed to delivering you the best products for creating freakin’ awesome hair. We may change our formulations from time to time to improve our range. Always check the packaging before use. Directions Spray on damp hair before blow drying or apply to dry hair before styling Manufacturer Contact Information TIGI® International Ltd, Bed Head Studio, London, SW11 4NP, UK. See more
